series_metadata.series_description: The System Backups Test Data Files are copies of test data files for applications that reside on the open systems environment (e.g. not the mainframe) needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: daily backups 4 days onsite all test environments except performance test environment external website. daily backups 14 days onsite performance test environment external website
